title: Abibliophobia | Enchanted Books
description: Refreshed textures for every enchanted book from vanilla with plenty of mods compatibility and even more soon!
body:
![Abibliophobia Label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af4ab21824bd464806f179af0f63aeadf3a17bac.png) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/abibliophobia-enchanted-books?style=for-the-badge&color=59196b&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/abibliophobia-enchanted-books) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1394777?style=for-the-badge&color=ce65eb&label=CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/abibliophobia-enchanted-books) ![Minecraft Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.18.x--1.21.11-blue?style=for-the-badge&color=16181c&logo=minecraft) ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-ARR-red?style=for-the-badge&color=16181c) **INFO:** Abibliophobia aims to make each enchanted book look unique and easily recognizable at a glance. The textures retain their vanilla-like feel, but their designs better reflect the books’ abilities and give them a more refined appearance. Abibliophobia would contain more and more of mods compatibility with time. **Under 1.21.5 Requires: [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads), [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), [CIT Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-cit), or other mod supporting the MCPatcher CIT format** ![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72108b56e644a64d7985e51dc469a14926a28ded.png) **CURRENT TEXTURES:** The pack currently contains retextures for all vanilla enchanted books up to 1.21.11, also includes a wide range of books from mods and would include more and more as well in the future.
LIST OF CURRENT TEXTURES
Tomes / Multienchants **Legend:** - Special enchants* - Enchants that could be applied to anything or most things like Mending or Unbreaking - Tomes are available only for 1.21.5+ - Enchanted Tome (Mix of multiple enchants) - Error Tome (Mix of impossible enchants like silk touch and fortuna) - Special Tome (Mix of any special enchants*) - Curse Tome (Mix of any enchants with at least one curse) - Fishing Tome (Mix of fishing enchants with any special enchants*) - Protection Tome (Mix of protection enchant with any special or armor enchants) - Sword Tome (Mix of any sword enchants with any special enchants*) - Tool Tome (Mix of any tool enchants with any special enchants*) - Bow Tome (Mix of any bow enchants with any special enchants*) - Trident Tome (Mix of any trident enchants with any special enchants*) - Mace Tome (Mix of any mace enchants with any special enchants*) - Crossbow Tome (Mix of any crossbow enchants with any special enchants*) - Knife Tome (Mix of any [compatible enchants](https://www.minecraft-guides.com/wiki/farmers-delight/tools/knives/) with backstabbing from farmer's delight) - Pickaxe Tome (For now basicly mix of any tool enchant with any veinmine enchant version, but overall tool tome expanded with pickaxe only enchants) - Mirror Tome (Just mix of any enchant for enderscape mirror) - Elytra Tome (Mix of elytra enchants with any special enchants*) - Happy Ghast Tome (Mix of happy ghast enchants) - Hoe Tome (Mix of any hoes enchantments with any tool or special enchants) - Axe Tome (Mix of any axe enchantments with any tool or special enchants)
Vanilla - Book - Written Book - Enchanted Book - Mending - Unbreaking - Curse of the Binding - Curse of the Vanishing - Lure - Luck of the Sea - Frost Walker - Thorns - Aqua Affinity - Respiration - Soul Speed - Swift Sneak - Depth Strider - Feather Falling - Protection - Projectile Protection - Blast Protection - Fire Protection - Smite - Bane of Arthropods - Looting - Fire Aspect - Sharpness - Sweeping Edge - Knockback - Fortune - Efficiency - Silk Touch - Infinity - Flame - Power - Punch - Loyalty - Riptide - Impaling - Channeling - Wind Burst - Breach - Density - Quick Charge - Multishot - Piercing - Lunge
Farmer's Delight [Farmer's Delight mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - Backstabbing
Veinminer Enchantment or Vein Mining [Veinminer Enchantment mod page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer-enchantment)
[Vein Mining mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/vein-mining) - Veinmine (Veinminer Enchantment) - Vein Mining (Vein Mining)
Enderscape [Enderscape mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape) - Bundling - Transdimensional - Rebound - Resonance
Dungeons and Taverns [Dungeons and Taverns mod page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) - Aerial's Bane - Antidote - Blowthrough - Curse of Conductivity - Ghasted - Gravity - Hydro Veil - Illager's Bane - Outreach - Photosynthesis - Might - Spiteful - Swift Soar - Traveler - Tri-shot - Wax Wings - Wither Coated
Bleeding Enchantment [Bleeding Enchantment mod page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bleeding-enchantment) - Bleeding
Enchancement (Early Access) As for early access enchantments doesnt work with tomes at all [Enchancement mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) - Apex - Beheading - Berserker - Brimstone - Disarm - Extracting - Grapple - Leech - Lumberjack - Molten - Scatter - Torch - Warp
Sortilege [Sortilege mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/sortilege) - Potency - Stability - Chaining - Wisdom - Bonk - Focus - Push - Pull - Brazier - Blizzard - Blast - Blitz - Magic Protection - Soulbound - Arcane - Curse of Ignorance - Blessing
Lullaby's Enchantments Collection (Early Access) [Lullaby's profile page](https://modrinth.com/user/lullaby)
[Lullaby;s Enchantments Expansion](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-expansion/versions) - Agility - Air Jump - Anti-Knockback - Attack Speed - Burnless - Freezing - Gravity - Health - Leaping - Life Steal - Magnetic - Path Speed - Poisoning - Reach - Smelting - Soulbound - Spectral - Swiftness - Thunder Strike - Timber - Toughness - True Shot - Undying - Veinminer - Vision - Withering - XP Boost
Deeper and Darker [Deeper and Darker mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) - Catalysis - Skulk Smite
Guarding [Guarding mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/guarding) - Barbed - Pummeling
Nether Depths Upgrade [Nether Depths Upgrade mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-depths-upgrade) - Hell Strider
Soul Fire'd [Soul Fire'd mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-fire-d) - Soul Fire Aspect - Soul Flame
Supplementaries [Supplementaries mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - Lumisense Fire Aspect - Lumisene Flame - Stasis
You're in Grave Danger [You're in Grave Danger mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/yigd) - Soulbound
Jaden's Nether Expansion [Jaden's Nether Expansion mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion) - Artemis - Barrage - Bloodshed - Cartridge - Phantom Hull - Recoil
Trailier Tales [Trailier Tales mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales) - reaping - rebrush
Frostiful [Frostiful mod page](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful) - curse of frozen touch - enervation - ice breaker - ice speed
![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72108b56e644a64d7985e51dc469a14926a28ded.png) **MORE INFO:** - Feel free to reach out to me on [Twitter](https://x.com/TheSniezekMC) for any errors, ideas, or just to write. - I'm planning to make as much compatibility with mods as I can, and I’d also love to hear y’all’s suggestions on Twitter ~~_or Discord if you manage to find me_~~. - Ngl I won't promise that it works correctly on version below 1.21.5 but it should though, will test it someday or you can write to me on [CurseForge comment section](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/abibliophobia-enchanted-books/comments) or on social media ([Twitter](https://x.com/TheSniezekMC)) for any errors. - For 1.21.5 tomes write to me if I missed some enchants, like there are thousands of code lines I might missed something or write proposition of multi enchants also on [CurseForge comment section](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/abibliophobia-enchanted-books/comments) or on social media ([Twitter](https://x.com/TheSniezekMC)) for any errors. - Also, this texture pack provides correct Roman numerals, so instead of something like sharpness enchantment.level.255, it displays sharpness CCLV. - As well for the colored named enchantments I will do the rest of modded enchantments but first I will do respackops so it will be toggable, also visual level on books and outline for every book as well but this in the future. - **License ARR**, you can't modify or reupload any of my assets or claim them as your own… Well, at least not without asking. I'm a nice dude, just talk to me, man — I’m not biting. ![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72108b56e644a64d7985e51dc469a14926a28ded.png) **Also check out other things I worked on:** [![Reeseeded icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7841c34ad930876bcef624061265038ee5352000.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reseeded-seeds-retexture) [![Flower² Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd262ba4991644126e83adeeee5357428e8a053f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/double-flower-retexture) ![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72108b56e644a64d7985e51dc469a14926a28ded.png) Thank y'all for all the downloads 🎉
